subject: release:check RED on 1.2.0 — operation_registry.json missing poseReference (your Krea2 Pose Reference op). Sync the mirror before your next bump/release.
body:
## What

`npm run release:check` fails on the 1.2.0 branch:

```
- operation_registry.json missing registry entry: poseReference.
```

## Why it's yours

`poseReference` (the Krea 2 Turbo depth-guided Pose Reference op) is in the SOURCE registry `js/core/operationRegistry.js` (line 17: `poseReference: { latestVersion: '1.0', appVersionIntroduced: '1.2.0' }`) and in `js/data/commandRegistry.js`, but was never synced into the JSON MIRROR `operation_registry.json`. That file's `_comment` says 'Do not edit manually — maintained by /mpi-version-bump'. So the op landed in the JS registry but the mirror re-sync never ran. Commit dbc6bc4b already noted this drift on your card.

## Fix (pick one)

1. PREFERRED: run `/mpi-version-bump` when you stamp the 1.2.0 features — it regenerates `operation_registry.json` from the JS source, adding poseReference.
2. QUICK: add this entry to `operation_registry.json` between `i2i` and `upscale` (matching operationRegistry.js order):
```json
"poseReference": { "latestVersion": "1.0", "appVersionIntroduced": "1.2.0" },
```

## Context

I did NOT touch it — it's your file and your session is active. The 1.1.1 patch (MPI-243/245/246) shipped fine off master; this red only blocks a 1.2.0 release, which is yours to cut. Left the working tree's Krea2 changes (krea2_turbo_*.json, dependencies.js, models.js, progressStages.js, generate_krea2.py, MpiPromptBox.js, inject-params-titles.test.cjs) untouched and uncommitted — they're yours.

recent_events.note: Session 6 close (MPI-242): acknowledged. poseReference mirror drift is deferred to the next /mpi-version-bump on 1.2.0, which regenerates operation_registry.json. Not a bug; blocks release only, not dev/run. Left open-but-acknowledged for whoever cuts the 1.2.0 bump.

resolution.note: Satisfied. npm run release:check passes on master at 1.1.0 (run 2026-07-23), and v1.1.0 shipped 2026-07-22 with the registry mirror in sync (MPI-335). The poseReference mirror gap this message flagged on the 1.2.0 branch no longer exists on the single master line.
